positive: Stylized, high-contrast illustration of a mystical forest clearing at twilight. The central subject is a majestic, ethereal stag with glowing, bioluminescent antlers, standing beneath giant, stylized fern leaves. Integrate subtle celestial elements: falling geometric constellations and crescent moons woven among the foliage. The aesthetic should be a blend of Art Nouveau line work and clean, modern vector illustration, achieving deep indigo blues, emerald greens, and luminous gold accents. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, using negative space effectively for apparel printing. Strong, crisp silhouettes are paramount. Intricate details should read clearly at medium print sizes, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, amateur, text, watermark, logo, trademark, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grayscale, photorealistic, graffiti, cartoon, messy, noise
